repo.description: A PyTorch implementation of the Transformer model in "Attention is All You Need".

terms.context_snippet: This is a PyTorch implementation of the Transformer model in "[Attention is All You Need](https://arxiv.org/abs/1706.03762)" (Ashish Vaswani, Noam Shazeer, Niki Parmar, Jakob Uszkoreit, Llion Jones, Aidan N. Gomez, Lukasz Kaiser, Illia Polosukhin, arxiv, 2017).
